**Code for reproduction**

<!--A minimum code snippet required to reproduce the bug.

any necessary plotted data.

```python
from pylab import *
t = np.random.random((10, 10, 4))
ax = plt.figure().add_subplot()
ax.imshow(t, extent=(0, 2, 0, 2))
ax.imshow(t, extent=(1, 3, 1, 3))
show()
```

```python
from pylab import *
t = np.random.random((10, 10, 4))
ax = plt.figure().add_subplot()
im1=ax.imshow(t, extent=(0, 2, 0, 2))
im2=ax.imshow(t, extent=(1, 3, 1, 3))
im3=ax.imshow(np.ma.MaskedArray(np.zeros((1,1)), mask=True), extent=(0, 3, 0, 3))
show()
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/matplotlib/matplotlib/issues/comments/2364071352/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
